name: Cross-Chain Bridge & Multi-Chain Operations
description: Cross-chain bridge operations: comparing bridge protocols (fees, speed, security), MEV protection, multi-chain arbitrage routing, flash loan coordination, and gas optimization across EVM and non-EVM chains.
prompt: Cross-chain bridge operations: comparing bridge protocols (fees, speed, security), MEV protection, multi-chain arbitrage routing, flash loan coordination, and gas optimization across EVM and non-EVM chains. Covers Ethereum, BSC, Polygon, Solana, Avalanche, Arbitrum, Optimism, Base.
